# The Agentic CMO — full content for LLMs

> Long-form companion to /llms.txt. Contains the canonical FAQ answers and the 24 Activate This prompt summaries in machine-readable form. Free to retrieve, quote, and attribute.

## Book metadata

- Title: The Agentic CMO
- Subtitle: How Artificial Intelligence Is Rewriting the Rules of Marketing Leadership
- Edition: Second Edition
- Author: Francesco Federico
- Publication date: June 2026
- Hardcover ISBN: 978-1-0676534-3-9
- Paperback ISBN: 978-1-0676534-1-5
- eBook ISBN: 978-1-0676534-4-6
- Includes: nineteen chapters, twenty-four Activate This prompts

## Core thesis

The age of marketing automation is ending. The era of marketing autonomy has begun. Marketing automation executes pre-defined workflows; marketing autonomy means routine decisions, drafts, and analyses produced by AI agents working under explicit specifications, with humans setting strategy, reviewing exceptions, and owning accountability. This shift requires a redesign of how marketing organisations are structured, staffed, briefed, governed, and led.

## Author

Francesco Federico is a Global Chief Marketing Officer with two decades inside information businesses. He writes the Chronicles of Change newsletter on agentic marketing.

Credentials:
- Doctor of Law, Università Cattolica del Sacro Cuore (Milan)
- Executive education: INSEAD, Harvard Business School, IMD, IE Business School
- Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Marketing (FCIM)
- Member, World Economic Forum Strategic Communicators Exchange
- Editorial board, Journal of Digital & Social Media Marketing
- Advisor: HFS Research, IDC

Recognition:
- Financial Narrative 50 (2025)
- The Drum Top 100 B2B CMOs (2025)
- CMO to Watch, CMO Alliance (2025, 2026)

For full employer history see https://the-agentic-cmo.com/about/
